assertions.title: Error state — extract Step 4 before Step 3 done

steps.action: Run domain flow in mock mode and call extract once state is complete
steps.expected: API rejects extraction in invalid state
steps.observed: Third POST /api/domain/extract returned 400 with "cannot extract in state complete"

assertions.title: Build endpoint triggers real file generation

steps.expected: 200 with version/task summary and files generated on disk
steps.observed: Received 200 with summary (version 6), but output directory and referenced files were missing

assertions.issues: Build response reports artifacts, but no generated files exist under output/ and changelog entries are marked failed with missing file paths.

assertions.title: End-to-end pipeline completes all 8 steps

steps.action: Advance pipeline until completion and inspect status
steps.expected: All 8 steps completed
steps.observed: Pipeline reports pipeline_complete but step_statuses still show step8=in_progress and others pending

steps.expected: All spaces filled and at least one generated file exists
steps.observed: Spaces are filled, but no output directory/files exist

evidence.network: POST /api/pipeline/advance repeated -> pipeline_complete; GET /api/pipeline/status -> step8 in_progress

assertions.issues: Step completion tracking did not reach completed statuses and no generated output files were present.

assertions.title: Act 2 uses Act 1 outputs as input context

steps.action: Compare problem/audience content to solution vocabulary terms
steps.expected: Vocabulary terms trace back to Act 1 problem data
steps.observed: No vocabulary term matched problem/audience text

assertions.issues: Vocabulary terms (User, Task, Workspace, Assignee, Due Date) did not appear in Problem Space text.

assertions.title: Act 3 builds on Act 2 specs

steps.action: Inspect generated tasks in version data
steps.expected: Tasks reference spec paths/categories from solution specs
steps.observed: All v6 tasks include non-empty related_specs pointing to solution.* paths

assertions.title: Pipeline gate blocks premature Act 2 entry

steps.action: Check whether Problem Space is unfilled
steps.expected: At least one required slot unfilled before attempting gate check
steps.observed: All problem slots already filled in shared service state

assertions.issues: Could not create a fresh/unfilled Problem Space scenario without destructive reset of shared project state.

assertions.title: Pipeline gate blocks premature Act 3 entry

steps.action: Attempt to validate premature Act 3 entry path
steps.expected: Rejection before Act 2 completion
steps.observed: Shared state already contains Solution Space artifacts; contract path /api/build/snapshot returns 404 while router uses /api/snapshot

assertions.issues: Premature-entry precondition could not be recreated safely in shared state; contract route also differs from implemented route.

assertions.title: Act 2 extraction writes valid YAML that solution page can read

steps.expected: All 11 spec categories present
steps.observed: 11 expected category keys are present

assertions.title: Act 2 domain data round-trips through API without data loss

steps.action: Compare Step 3 extracted payload to subsequent map reads
steps.expected: Field-by-field equivalence
steps.observed: architecture_components.depends_on changed from [] to null for two components

assertions.issues: Round-trip mutation observed: empty arrays became null in architecture component depends_on fields.

assertions.title: Pipeline state persists through server restart (Act 1 → restart → Act 2)

steps.expected: Stop/restart server and validate persisted state
steps.observed: Restart prohibited by assignment (shared services must not be stopped/restarted)

assertions.issues: Blocked by explicit mission constraint: do not stop/restart shared services.

assertions.title: Pipeline state persists mid-act (partial Act 2 → restart)

steps.expected: Restart and verify Step 3 completed / Step 4 pending
steps.observed: Restart prohibited by assignment

assertions.issues: Blocked by explicit mission constraint: do not stop/restart shared services.

assertions.title: Map data survives restart

steps.expected: Compare map data before and after restart
steps.observed: Restart prohibited by assignment

assertions.issues: Blocked by explicit mission constraint: do not stop/restart shared services.

assertions.title: In-progress step resumes after crash recovery

steps.expected: Kill server mid-step and verify retryable state on restart
steps.observed: Crash/restart actions are prohibited on shared services

assertions.issues: Blocked by explicit mission constraint: cannot kill or restart shared server.

assertions.title: POST /api/domain/start returns Step 3 prompt

steps.expected: 200 with data.prompt and step=step3
steps.observed: Returned 200 with prompt text and step=step3

assertions.title: POST /api/domain/start with mode=mock uses mock extraction

steps.expected: Deterministic mock domain payload
steps.observed: Extract response returned stable mock domain structure

assertions.title: POST /api/domain/extract runs Step 3 extraction

steps.expected: status=step3_done with extracted domain data
steps.observed: Returned status=step3_done, next=step4, extracted domain data present

assertions.title: Step 3 extract auto-triggers Step 4 prompt

steps.expected: Response includes step4_prompt
steps.observed: step4_prompt returned alongside step3 extracted payload

assertions.title: Second POST /api/domain/extract runs Step 4 extraction

steps.expected: status=complete and 11 spec categories returned
steps.observed: Returned status=complete with all 11 expected category keys (plus glossary_terms/decisions)

assertions.title: Domain start requires .bropilot directory

steps.expected: POST /api/domain/start returns 400 missing .bropilot
steps.observed: .bropilot exists in shared project and cannot be safely removed

assertions.issues: Missing-.bropilot precondition cannot be tested without destructive modification of shared project directory.

assertions.title: Domain extract without start returns 400

steps.action: Call POST /api/domain/extract before issuing a new start in this run
steps.expected: 400 with domain worker not started
steps.observed: Received 400 "cannot extract in state complete" because a domain worker was already running in shared server state

assertions.issues: Precondition (no domain worker started) was not controllable on shared long-lived service; no stop endpoint and restart is prohibited.

assertions.title: Restarting domain session kills old worker

steps.expected: Second start returns fresh step3 prompt and new session state
steps.observed: Both calls returned 200; extract after second start returned step3_done (fresh state)

assertions.title: Pipeline resumes from persisted position

steps.expected: After restart, advance continues from persisted step
steps.observed: Restart prohibited by assignment

assertions.issues: Blocked by explicit mission constraint: do not stop/restart shared services.

assertions.title: Fresh project starts at step 0

steps.action: Plan fresh-project test requiring state file removal and restart
steps.expected: current_step_index=0 on fresh start
steps.observed: Cannot safely remove shared pipeline_state.yaml or restart shared service

assertions.issues: Fresh-start precondition requires destructive reset of shared state and restart, both out of bounds.

assertions.title: Concurrent access safety

steps.expected: State file remains valid and status consistent
steps.observed: Both responses succeeded; status remained consistent at step4 in progress; pipeline_state.yaml remained parseable YAML

assertions.title: All 34 existing API endpoints respond after M1 changes

steps.action: Run 34-request API sweep across existing route surface
steps.expected: Valid JSON and no HTTP 500 responses
steps.observed: All 34 requests returned JSON with HTTP 200; no 500 responses observed

evidence.network: 34 curl requests across /api/* returned 200 and JSON

frictions.description: Shared API instance carried pre-existing worker/map state, preventing clean fresh-start scenarios for some assertions.
frictions.resolution: Documented as blocked where preconditions required fresh state and could not be recreated safely.

frictions.description: Validation contract references POST /api/build/snapshot, but current router exposes POST /api/snapshot.
frictions.resolution: Tested both paths and recorded outcomes (404 for contract path, 200 for implemented path).

frictions.description: CURL surface cannot verify browser console errors for solution page rendering checks.
frictions.resolution: Validated API data shape via curl and recorded limitation in evidence/report.

blockers.description: Restart-based assertions could not be executed because mission explicitly forbids stopping/restarting shared services.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reviewed for non-disruptive alternatives; no restart-free equivalent can validate persistence-across-restart semantics.

blockers.description: Missing-.bropilot and fresh-unstarted-worker scenarios were not safely reproducible on shared long-lived service state.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked current space/worker state via API and avoided destructive resets in shared environment.

summary: Tested 25 assertions: 11 passed, 4 failed, 10 blocked, 0 skipped. Failures: VAL-CGEN-009, VAL-CROSS-001, VAL-CROSS-002, VAL-CROSS-007.
